message:
fix(analytics,daemon,export,ui): validation hardening, daemon client improvements, export fixes, and minor UI adjustments

- Harden analytics validation with additional boundary checks
- Improve daemon client error handling and reconnection logic
- Fix export path with additional edge case handling
- Minor page component adjustments (config_input, confirmation, password, wizard)
- Analytics chart rendering refinements
- UI app minor adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -496,7 +496,7 @@ impl PagesConfig {
             .encryption
             .password
             .as_ref()
-            .is_some_and(|p| p.len() < 12)
+            .is_some_and(|p| p.chars().count() < 12)
         {
             warnings.push(
                 "Password is less than 12 characters. Consider using a stronger password."

@@ -8766,7 +8766,7 @@ impl CassApp {
                 "workspace": hit.workspace,
                 "workspace_original": hit.workspace_original,
                 "source_path": hit.source_path,
-                "score": hit.score,
+                "score": if hit.score.is_finite() { hit.score } else { 0.0 },
                 "content_length": hit.content.len(),
                 "source_id": hit.source_id,
                 "source_kind": normalized_source_kind(Some(hit.origin_kind.as_str()), &hit.source_id),
@@ -8881,7 +8881,7 @@ impl CassApp {
                 "workspace": hit.workspace,
                 "workspace_original": hit.workspace_original,
                 "source_path": hit.source_path,
-                "score": hit.score,
+                "score": if hit.score.is_finite() { hit.score } else { 0.0 },
                 "content_length": hit.content.len(),
                 "source_id": hit.source_id,
                 "source_kind": normalized_source_kind(Some(hit.origin_kind.as_str()), &hit.source_id),
